case_title: PATEL, SAM D. vs. HERNANDEZ, THALIA M. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, SAM D. SERVED FEB-20-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, THALIA M.
